memoryArtifacts.headline: Lady Beatrice is of the Portuguese Royal House but exact ancestry is controversial
memoryArtifacts.description:
According to Rentyon Dunop, her ancestry is controversial.

"Of the Lady Beatrice and the endless, but rather unconvincing, arguments concerning her birth and parentage, little must here be said. That …

zh.lifeSummary: Beatrice Pinto於1397年出生在葡萄牙。她於1418年10月19日之後與Sir Thomas Fettiplace結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1447年12月25日在英國英格蘭波克夏易亞斯特 雪福德享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏易亞斯特 雪福德。

nameMeanings.name: Pinto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Luis, Fernando, Mario, Ana, Juan, Ricardo, Alvaro, Cesar, Jorge.  Italian Antonio, Angelo, Vito, Carmine, Salvatore, Donato, Gaetano, Geno, Giovanni, Lucio, Marco, Rocco.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Armanda, Manoel, Ademir, Afonso, Agostinho, Albano, Anabela, Damiao, Henrique.
Spanish and Jewish (Sephardic): nickname from pinto ‘colorful, painted’.
Spanish: habitational name from Pinto in Madrid.

variants.name: Penta
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Camillo, Salvatore, Antimo, Domenic, Domenico, Franco, Marcello, Rocco, Sal.
habitational name from Penta, a district of Fisciano, in Salerno province, or possibly from other minor places called with penta ‘rock’.

variants.name: Lo Pinto
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Sal, Antonino, Aida, Carmine, Rosario, Salvadore, Vito.
Italian (Sicily; also Lopinto): variant of Pinto , with the addition of the definite article lo.

variants.name: Pinta
meanings: French: variant of Pinte, a metonymic occupational name for an official who controlled measures, from (Old) French pinte ‘pint, quart’, or of Pintat, from Old French pintat ‘half-pint’.
Italian: from the feminine form of   Pinto  .

variants.name: Pintor
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Alfredo, Alberto, Juan, Julio, Manuel, Silvia, Adolfo, Ana, Andres, Arthuro, Ascencion.  Italian Antonio, Lorenzo, Tullio.
Spanish, Catalan, Portuguese, Galician, and Italian (Sardinia): occupational name for a painter, from pintor ‘painter’.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

historicEvents.description: Diogo Silves discovers the Azores Islands.

en.lifeSummary: Beatrice Pinto was born in 1397, in Portugal. She married Sir Thomas Fettiplace after 19 October 1418. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 25 December 1447, in East Shefford, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in East Shefford, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Beatrice Pinto est née en 1397, à Portugal. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Fettiplace après 19 octobre 1418. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 25 décembre 1447, à East Shefford, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à East Shefford, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Morì il 25 dicembre 1447, nel East Shefford, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a East Shefford, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice Pintoは1397年にポルトガルで生まれた。1418年10月19日以後にSir Thomas Fettiplaceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1447年12月25日にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアエアスト シェフォードで50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアエアスト シェフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice Pinto(은)는 1397년 포르투갈에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1418년 10월 19일 이후 Sir Thomas Fettiplace(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1447년 12월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 이스트 셰퍼드에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 이스트 셰퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Beatrice Pinto nasceu em 1397, em Portugal. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Fettiplace após 19 de outubro de 1418. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 25 de dezembro de 1447, em East Shefford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em East Shefford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Beatrice Pinto родилась в 1397 г. в местности Португалия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Fettiplace после 19 октябрь 1418 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 25 декабря 1447 г. в местности эаст шеффорд, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности эаст шеффорд, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
